title: Composition Candidates To Add
description: New compositions (frameworks, services, protocols, applications) surfaced during scans or pattern authoring but not yet catalogued in compositions-src/. The symmetric analog of pattern-todo.json for the composition layer. Distinct from compositions-todo.json (a pattern-centric usage-coverage worklist). Each entry names a candidate composition, the patterns it would implement, and the upstream evidence with a verifiable url and verbatim quote. needs_verification:true means the candidate was surfaced from a secondary mention and must have its own primary source content-verified before authoring. Entries graduate by being authored into compositions-src/ and removed from this list.
